info.description: Strike a balance of friendship and hatred for your colleagues. Strike a balance between benefits and hindrances. But most of all, strike The Gong.

info.helpText:
To start, everyone takes a seat.
Click the square pink button.
Divvy up the chips.
Click the square pink button.
Divvy up the chips.
Click the square pink button.
Divvy up the chips.
Click the square pink button.
Divvy up the chips.
Click the square pink button.
Divvy up the chips.
Click the square pink button.
Divvy up the chips.
Click the square pink button.
Divvy up the chips.
...etc.

Between rounds, use the green and red counters on the left of the play area if you wish to keep track of wins/losses.

Chips are manually dragged in front of each player over the course of a round.

Benefits and hindrances are optional and can be revealed anywhere in the play area. There is a discard area for these cards.

The Sort decks button recalls the benefits and hindrances cards to their decks and orders them numerically from 1-10.

10.text: One player takes this card. Their hand beats every other hand of the same rank

01.text: One player shows another player their pocket cards

02.text: One player tells the table the rank of their hand (e.g. 'royal flush')

03.text: After dealing pocket cards, everyone reveals how many face cards they have

04.text: Choose a card value. One player reveals how many pocket cards they have of that value

05.text: One player draws one pocket card, then discards one pocket card

06.text: After dealing pocket cards, each player gives a card to the player to their left

07.text: One player takes this card to replace a pocket card. This card counts as a J with no suit

08.text: After dealing pocket cards, each players reveals the sum of their cards (faces = 10, A = 11)

09.text: After dealing pocket cards, shuffle and redistribute the pocket cards

10.text: Each player receives three pocket cards instead of two

02.text: Value 1 chips cannot change owners once claimed

03.text: If any flop cards are face cards, the player with the white value 1 chip discards their pocket cards and draws new ones

04.text: Before revealing hands, the table must guess a card value in the hand of the owner of the highest red chip. If incorrect you lose

06.text: The highest value chips cannot change owners once claimed

07.text: If none of the flop cards are face cards, the player with the highest value white chip discards their pocket cards and draws new ones

08.text: Chips are discarded before revealing any house cards (flop, turn, and river)

09.text: Before revealing hands, the table must guess the rank of the owner of the highest red chip. If incorrect you lose

ref.detail:
Hand rankings
RankExample
1. Royal FlushA♢ K♢ Q♢ J♢ 10♢
2. Straight FlushQ♣ J♣ 10♣ 9♣ 8♣
3. Four of a kind8♡ 8♣ 8♢ 8♠
4. Full house9♡ 9♣ 9♢ 3♠ 3♡
5. FlushK♡ J♡ 7♡ 5♡ 2♡
6. Straight10♡ 9♣ 8♢ 7♠ 6♡
7. Three of a kind4♡ 4♣ 4♢
8. Two pairQ♠ Q♡ 10♣ 10♢
9. PairA♢ A♣
10. High cardK♡
